description_long: This cabin consists of three interconnected rectangular volumes elevated on slender stilts, with a modern, modular design. The exterior is clad in dark wood with large glass panels, especially prominent on the gable ends, allowing for ample natural light and panoramic views. The central section features a spacious outdoor deck with a dining table and seating, connecting the two main living areas. One section has a prominent staircase leading up to a glass-fronted entry, while the other two volumes have expansive windows and skylights. The rooflines are steeply pitched gables, giving the structure a contemporary yet rustic appearance. The overall layout suggests a focus on communal living and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, modular cabin with three gabled volumes on stilts, dark wood cladding, large glass windows, and a central outdoor deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, large glass gable ends, and the central outdoor deck with dining furniture.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat wall of the central volume, skylights on the roof, and the arrangement of windows on the rightmost section.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full width of the cabin, large glass panels on the lower sections, and the connection between the three volumes.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the entry staircase, the side of the central deck, and the relationship between the three main cabin sections.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roofs with skylights and overhangs, clad in dark material
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple large, floor-to-ceiling windows on gable ends, asymmetrical distribution with some grouped and some single, skylights on the roof, and a mix of vertical and horizontal window shapes
attribute_door_placement: one main exterior door accessed by a staircase on the leftmost volume, adjacent to the central deck area
